rationale: A registry run key was added (A0, EV-001, EV-002) and then subsequently deleted (EV-003, EV-004, EV-005) within a short timeframe by the same user and parent process (PowerShell). This pattern suggests a test or cleanup operation rather than persistent malicious activity. The encoded PowerShell command in EV-001 and EV-003 also contains 'Test' and 'Cleanup' parameters, further supporting a benign explanation.
